reasoning: Zootopia 2 is scheduled to release on Wednesday, November 26, 2025, right before Thanksgiving. The resolution specifically states it will evaluate the 3-day weekend (Friday, November 28 to Sunday, November 30). Because the film opens on Wednesday, a massive portion of its opening demand will be absorbed on Wednesday and Thursday. Historically, no animated Thanksgiving Wednesday release has ever had the highest 3-day opening weekend of the entire year, as they almost always lose to massive summer or winter Friday openers (e.g., Marvel films, Jurassic World, Star Wars, or Avatar). In 2025, Zootopia 2 would have to beat the 3-day openings of major blockbuster Friday releases like Jurassic World Rebirth, Superman, The Fantastic Four, Captain America: Brave New World, and Avatar: Fire and Ash. Even if Zootopia 2 had an explosive 5-day performance matching Inside Out 2 (e.g., $150M+), its Friday-Sunday slice would likely fall into the $90M-$105M range, which is well below the historical baseline of $130M+ openings for Jurassic World and Avatar sequels. Due to the structural disadvantage of its Wednesday release date and the stiff competition from major franchise tentpoles in 2025, the chance of Zootopia 2 capturing the absolute highest 3-day domestic opening weekend is functionally near zero. Using the lowest allowed probability bounds, I estimate this at 5%.
